description: Optimal u8 division sequences for Z80 (v3: carry_compare for K>=128)
method: A÷K via 6 strategies: shift, mul_shift, preshift_mul, mul_add256_shift, double_mul_shift, carry_compare
convention: Input: A = dividend. Output: A = quotient = floor(A/K).

entries.notes: div2 = 1× SRL A
div4 = 2× SRL A
div8 = 3× SRL A
div16 = 4× SRL A
div32 = 5× SRL A
